title: Extreme Tic-Tac-Toe
description: An Extreme Version of the game Tic-Tac-Toe
body:
## Extreme Tic-Tac-Toe

Extreme Tic-Tac-Toe in Minecraft is a race where two players take turns claiming spots on the randomly generated board of items with the ultimate goal being to get 3 in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally. 

Turn duration and Turn stealing on kill can be toggled in the Mialib Menu, and the possible items can be changed with a datapack via a tag.

Type **/ultitato start player1 player2** to start the game.

Requires the Trial Chambers experimental features while on 1.20.6.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WLdZVb8JB7E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Mod created by AmyMialee for Baablu.
